tools.name: slack_list_channels
tools.description: List public or pre-defined channels in the workspace with pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default 100, max 200)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results

tools.name: slack_post_message
tools.description: Post a new message to a Slack channel.

parameters.name: channel_id
parameters.description: The ID of the channel to post to

tools.name: slack_reply_to_thread
tools.description: Reply to a specific message thread in Slack.

parameters.name: channel_id
parameters.description: The ID of the channel containing the thread

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: The timestamp of the parent message

tools.name: slack_add_reaction
tools.description: Add a reaction emoji to a message.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the message to react to

tools.name: slack_get_channel_history
tools.description: Get recent messages from a channel.

tools.name: slack_get_thread_replies
tools.description: Get all replies in a message thread.

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: The timestamp of the parent message

tools.name: slack_get_users
tools.description: Get a list of all users in the workspace with their basic profile information.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return (default 100, max 200)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results

tools.name: slack_get_user_profile
tools.description: Get detailed profile information for a specific user.
